phone_presence_notes: Grant was consistently warm and professional, handled customer pushback on the estimate with patience rather than defensiveness, and the returning-customer context felt acknowledged and appreciated.
top_strength: Thorough inventory intake — walked every room, garage, specialty items, and box count systematically; also handled a skeptical customer on estimate time professionally.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass was completely missed — no consolidation speech, no carload tip, no mention that prep reduces the bill. Meet Your Mover and On-Time Guarantee were also absent. These three differentiators are table stakes on every full sales call. Also, the agenda opener was skipped — Grant jumped straight into availability rather than setting a brief roadmap for the call. Add those elements before moving to availability next time.
